creator: tom+fbsdbugzilla@nuegia.net
text:
(In reply to Mark Johnston from comment #1)

Do try to reproduce inside of a jail. I was using a zroot install and iocage. I also was on the latest patchlevel at the time using syspatch, though the system isn't reporting the versions properly. I was told this was expected for the current set of patches.

I don't think using onestart/onestop will have a different effect.

If needed I can provide a prosody config file but try replicating the crash from within a jail first.
